title: Asana
description: Your assigned Asana tasks, search tasks, and look up a task by gid.

title: BambooHR
description: Look up people in the BambooHR employee directory.

title: Bitbucket
description: Open pull requests in your Bitbucket Cloud repository.

title: Box
description: Browse your Box files and search Box by keyword.

title: Office Cafes
description: Cafes near your office via OpenStreetMap.

title: ClickUp
description: Your ClickUp tasks from the org default list; look up a task by id.

title: Confluence (Cloud)
description: Search Confluence pages by space, title, label, type, author, or hierarchy (Atlassian Cloud), with a full rich page preview.

title: Active Incidents
description: PagerDuty + Datadog + ServiceNow incidents in one list.

title: My Team
description: List your direct reports or peers under your manager.

title: Dropbox
description: Browse and search files in your Dropbox.

title: Figma
description: My recent Figma files.

title: Freshdesk Tickets
description: Browse and search Freshdesk support tickets.

title: Google Calendar
description: Show upcoming events on your primary calendar, or search your calendar by keyword.

title: Google Drive
description: Recent files and search across your Google Drive.

title: GitHub (my work)
description: Your open GitHub issues and pull requests, via a personal token (no IT).

title: GitHub
description: Search pull requests + issues, or look up by owner/repo#N.

title: GitLab Merge Requests
description: Your open GitLab merge requests; search and look up by !iid.

title: Gmail
description: Search Gmail conversations using Gmail's standard search operators (from:, subject:, is:unread, newer_than:, has:attachment, ...).

title: HubSpot CRM
description: Search HubSpot companies and contacts (official HubSpot Remote MCP).

title: Intercom
description: Search Intercom conversations and look one up by id (open conversations by default).

title: Jira Work
description: Search Jira issues, browse sprints, and look up tickets by key.

title: Jira Work (Cloud)
description: Search Jira issues, browse sprints, and look up tickets by key (Atlassian Cloud).

title: Linear
description: Search Linear issues across your teams, and look up issues by identifier.

title: Monday
description: Items from a monday.com board: search, look up by board id, browse.

title: New Relic
description: Run an NRQL query against your New Relic account, or ask in plain English.

title: Notion
description: Search Notion pages and databases across your workspace.

title: OneDrive
description: Browse and search files in your OneDrive (Microsoft Graph).

title: Outlook
description: Search Outlook mail.

title: Pipedrive
description: My open deals, deal search, and people in Pipedrive CRM.

title: Salesforce
description: Search Salesforce accounts by name or owner, and look up an account by record Id.

title: SharePoint
description: Search SharePoint files, folders, and sites (Microsoft Work IQ).

title: Slack
description: Search Slack messages across channels you belong to.

title: Splunk
description: Run a Splunk search (SPL) and browse the matching events.

title: Stripe
description: Recent Stripe customers (official Stripe Remote MCP).

title: Microsoft Teams
description: Recent Teams chats and messages from a pinned chat or channel.

title: Trello
description: Your Trello cards, plus lists and boards (self-hosted Trello MCP).

title: Workday
description: Search Workday workers (requires custom Workday MCP setup).

title: Zendesk Support
description: Search Zendesk support tickets, look up a ticket by number, and find users.

title: S3 Buckets
description: List via the `aws` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Browser tabs
description: Open tabs from a Chromium started with --remote-debugging-port=9222 (loopback)

title: Demo · Cards
description: Sample service tiles with status badges, canned data, zero setup.

title: Demo · Chart
description: Sample bar chart of deploys/day, canned data, zero setup.

title: Demo · Detail
description: Sample single-record detail pane, canned data, zero setup.

title: Demo · Diff
description: Sample config drift (prod vs staging) as a line diff, canned data, zero setup.

title: Demo · Table
description: Sample services table, canned data, zero setup.

title: Demo · JSON tree
description: Sample API response as a collapsible JSON tree, canned data, zero setup.

title: Log expense
description: Record an expense to ~/.bolt/expenses.jsonl and review recent ones.

title: My Pull Requests
description: Search your GitHub PRs. Enter = recent; add a term or qualifier (repo:…, is:open, label:…) to filter.

title: Recent commits
description: Recent commits of a repo (sha · subject · author · date), by name or path

title: Working diff
description: Compare a file's committed HEAD version against your current working-tree edits (red/green line diff)

title: Git status
description: Short git status of a repo (branch, changed files), by name or path

title: My Merge Requests
description: Search your GitLab MRs. Enter = recent; add a term to filter by title/description.

title: Incident payload
description: Reshape a pasted incident JSON into a table, with a runbook action + Slack/Jira copy formats (pure, on-device)

title: Pods
description: List via the `kubectl` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Markdown preview
description: Render a local Markdown file in the right pane (sanitized, scrollable)

title: Quick note
description: Save a thought to today.md, or search your notes

title: Okta Apps
description: List via the `okta` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Ollama models
description: Models installed in your local Ollama. Reads 127.0.0.1:11434; never leaves your machine.

title: Parse app logs
description: Keep ERROR lines from a log block and shape (time · component · message) into a table (pure, on-device)

title: PagerDuty Incidents
description: List via the `pd` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Recent files
description: Recently modified files across ~/Downloads, ~/Documents, ~/Desktop

title: Scrub PII
description: Mask SSNs and emails in a pasted block, then strip hidden characters (pure, on-device)

title: Service war room
description: Fan out CI · deploys · pods · incidents for a service; rich detail on the right

title: Salesforce Orgs
description: List via the `sf` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Today's screenshots
description: Screenshots from today on ~/Desktop; optional query filters by name

title: Slack Workspaces
description: List via the `slack` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Stripe Products
description: List via the `stripe` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: System overview
description: Local system at a glance: disk, ports, network, security, cpu, memory, battery in one fan-out

title: Twilio Numbers
description: List via the `twilio` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Clean vendor CSV
description: Strip the TOTAL summary row from a pasted CSV and emit data rows as JSON (pure, on-device)

title: Vercel Projects
description: List via the `vercel` CLI. Enter to load, then filter the results.

title: Whois lookup
description: Registrar, expiry, status, and name servers for a domain
